overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player driving a futuristic flying car through Night City. The vehicle navigates from dense neon-lit commercial districts through tight urban canyons and onto open highways, showcasing the game's cyberpunk aesthetic with high-quality ray-traced lighting and detailed futuristic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated commercial roadway with neon signage

events.description: vehicle begins ascending on elevated ramp structure
BD SHACK neon sign comes into view on the right side

agents.ego_description: navigating a futuristic flying car through elevated city streets, approaching commercial district with neon signs

notable_agents.action: other flying car traveling in same direction ahead on the elevated roadway

entered.detail: elevated road with distinctive red and white striped lane markings
tall futuristic glass building with reflective chrome surfaces
large neon sign for BD SHACK with pink and yellow coloring
various holographic and neon advertisements on building facades

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view from inside a futuristic flying car cockpit, navigating elevated roadways through a dense cyberpunk commercial district. The vehicle moves past glass office towers and neon signage, including the prominent BD SHACK sign, while maintaining moderate speed through the enclosed urban canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: tight urban canyon between high-rise buildings

events.description: vehicle slows dramatically to navigate tight turn between buildings
passes under large structural overpass temporarily blocking sky view

agents.ego_description: slowly maneuvering through tight urban canyon, making sharp turns between buildings at low speed while navigating under structural overpasses

entered.detail: massive concrete pillars supporting elevated highway structures
dark tunnel-like passage under building overhangs and elevated roads

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a tightly enclosed urban canyon, slowing significantly to navigate sharp turns between massive concrete support pillars and under dark overpass structures. The BD SHACK sign and glass towers disappear from view as the car maneuvers through the shadowed, confined space.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway interchange with merging traffic lanes

events.description: exits tight urban canyon into open highway interchange with multiple levels
vehicle accelerates onto main highway reaching higher speeds above 80 kmh

agents.ego_description: accelerating onto open highway, merging with traffic flow and gaining speed while navigating interchange ramps

notable_agents.action: white flying car ahead changing lanes on the highway
purple flying car passing on the left side

entered.detail: multi-level highway ramps and overpasses with complex road geometry
tall palm trees lining the highway median and edges
low-rise commercial structures with large advertising displays

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the confined urban canyon, the scene opens into a wide highway interchange bathed in bright sunlight. The vehicle accelerates past palm trees and commercial buildings, merging with moderate flying traffic including a white car ahead and a purple car passing on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: open multi-lane highway with industrial outskirts

events.description: vehicle reaches maximum speed exceeding 90 kmh on open highway
landscape transitions to industrial outskirts with power transmission towers visible

agents.ego_description: cruising at high speed on open highway, overtaking other vehicles and approaching industrial zone with distant mountains visible

notable_agents.action: black flying car being overtaken on the highway

entered.detail: desert industrial area with sparse buildings and rocky terrain
hazy mountain range visible on the horizon beyond the city
tall electrical pylons with multiple high-tension cables

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows high-speed cruising on an open highway leaving the dense city behind. The landscape transitions to industrial outskirts with power transmission towers, rocky terrain, and distant mountains visible on the horizon. The vehicle overtakes sparse traffic while maintaining speeds above 90 kmh in the wide-open space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the neon-lit density of a commercial district into the expansive, sun-drenched industrial outskirts of the city. It begins inside a futuristic cockpit navigating elevated roadways past glass office towers and glowing BD SHACK signage within an enclosed urban canyon. As the vehicle slows to maneuver through sharp turns, the bright lights fade, and the environment shifts into a shadowed, confined space dominated by massive concrete support pillars and dark overpasses. The scene then opens abruptly into a wide highway interchange bathed in bright sunlight, where the car accelerates past palm trees and merges with a flow of purple and white flying traffic. Finally, the landscape transitions from the urban core to an open highway, cruising at high speeds past power transmission towers and rocky terrain toward distant mountains on the horizon.
